name: Cheri Oteri
blurb: A high-energy character comedian of the late-'90s SNL.
bio: Cheri Oteri is an American comedian and actress who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1995 to 2000, known for the Spartan cheerleader Arianna (with Will Ferrell) and other manic characters. She has worked steadily in film and voice acting since.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
